# sensei
> A CLI and MCP server that indexes a codebase once, exposes exports at four resolution levels (L0-L3), and measures AI skills impact through A/B benchmarks.

## Entry Points
- [cli.ts](packages/cli/src/cli.ts): async

## .
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): sensei
- [PATTERNS.md](PATTERNS.md): Patterns
- [README.md](README.md): sensei

## apps/dashboard
- [README.md](apps/dashboard/README.md): sv

- [hooks.server.ts](apps/dashboard/src/hooks.server.ts): handle

- [demo-stubs.ts](apps/dashboard/src/lib/demo-stubs.ts): demoUser, demoWorkspaces, demoRepos, demoTeams, demoLibraries

## packages/cli/src/commands
- [add.ts](packages/cli/src/commands/add.ts): add
